Package com.kbtu.university.model.user

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.user.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Admin, Employee, Student, UserDecorator
public abstract class User extends Object implements Serializable
Base class for every authenticated actor in the system. Holds credentials and language preference, exposes authentication and a role hook that subclasses must implement.
